title: Soft Tissue Injuries
metaTitle: Soft Tissue Injuries — Symptoms, Treatment & Legal Rights
metaDescription: Soft tissue injuries from accidents include sprains, strains, and contusions. Learn symptoms, treatment options, and your rights in CA and AZ.
description: Soft tissue injuries — including sprains, strains, muscle tears, and contusions — are among the most common injuries in accidents. Despite being frequently dismissed as 'minor,' severe soft tissue damage can cause chronic pain, limit mobility, and result in significant medical costs and lost wages.
symptoms: Localized pain or tenderness at the injury site
Reduced range of motion in affected joints or muscles
Pain that worsens with movement or activity
Stiffness, especially in the mornings or after inactivity
Numbness or tingling if nerves are involved
longTermEffects: Chronic pain syndromes if injuries are not properly treated
Scar tissue formation leading to restricted movement
Re-injury risk due to weakened ligaments or tendons
Fibromyalgia-like symptoms in severe or repeated trauma cases
Psychological effects including anxiety related to pain and activity limitations
treatmentOptions: RICE protocol (rest, ice, compression, elevation) for acute injuries
Physical therapy and targeted rehabilitation exercises
Surgery for complete ligament or tendon ruptures
commonCauses: Slip and fall accidents on wet or uneven surfaces
Workplace overexertion and repetitive motion injuries
Construction site falls and equipment accidents
